---
name: New misconception family
about: Propose a new misconception family for inclusion in the taxonomy
title: "[NEW FAMILY] "
labels: taxonomy
assignees: ''
---

## Proposed family name
A short, descriptive name (e.g., "Albedo effect ignored").

## Proposed ID
Suggested ID in the format `MFxx_short_name` (we will assign the final ID).

## Definition
1–2 sentence plain-language definition of the misconception.

## Inclusion rules
What counts as this misconception? Be specific.

## Exclusion rules
What does NOT count? What might be confused with this family?

## Example responses
Provide 2–3 example student responses that would receive this label.

## Counterexamples
Provide 2–3 responses that look similar but should NOT receive this label.

## Evidence / source
Where does this misconception appear in the literature or classroom practice? (Optional but helpful.)
